summary: Landing page hero section redesign testing completed. All visual elements verified: new headline, split layout, CTA buttons, trust indicators, AI visualization, fund stats, features section, footer. Mobile responsiveness confirmed. Login form submission has a bug - API works but form doesn't trigger API call.

ui_bugs.issue: Form submission (clicking Sign In button) does not trigger the login API call. The API works correctly when called directly via fetch(), but the form's onSubmit handler doesn't execute the API request. Tokens are not stored in localStorage after form submission.

passed_tests: Landing page (/) renders hero section with new headline 'AI-Powered Signal Intelligence for Modern Traders' ✓
Hero section has 'Get Started' button linking to /register ✓
Hero section has 'View Signals' button linking to /dashboard ✓
Trust indicators visible: 'Powered by AlphaAI Signal Intelligence', 'Used by traders in 40+ countries', 'Backtested accuracy engine' ✓
AI visualization (hero-visualization data-testid) renders on the right side ✓
AI visualization includes neural grid, animated waveforms, pulsing nodes, Brain icon center, floating data labels ✓
Fund stats cards visible below hero (stat-nav, stat-aum, stat-sharpe, stat-return) ✓
Features section visible below hero ('Self-Improving AI System') ✓
Footer visible with PoweredByTag and BrandLockup ✓
Splash screen plays on first visit then fades to hero ✓
Mobile responsive: hero stacks vertically on small screens (390x844) ✓
Mobile: Fund stats visible after scroll ✓
Login API works correctly (POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with tokens) ✓
PRO badge visible in navigation for Pro users ✓
User dropdown visible after manual token storage ✓
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix login form submission - the form's onSubmit handler is not triggering the API call. The handleSubmit function in AuthPages.jsx (line 51) should call the login() function from AuthContext, but the API request is not being made when the form is submitted via button click or Enter key.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero section redesign implemented correctly with all required elements
HeroVisualization SVG component has proper animations using SMIL
Split layout uses CSS grid with lg:grid-cols-2 for responsive behavior
Trust indicators use proper data-testid for testing
Login form has correct onSubmit handler but API call is not executing - needs investigation

success_rate.frontend: 90% (All hero section features work, login form submission bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page hero section redesign verified. All visual elements work correctly. Login form has a bug where form submission doesn't trigger API call - the API works when called directly via fetch(). The issue is likely in the form submission event handling in AuthPages.jsx. Pro user demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com works correctly when tokens are manually stored.
